title: Docs product pack — fabric-os
principle: Product experience SoR lives under docs/product/. Foundation holds why; business holds market and ICP; product holds surfaces, journeys, acceptance/UAT scenarios, and product-facing requirements. Technical ADRs/specs remain under docs/architecture/. Roadmaps are forbidden here and live only under docs/roadmap/.

requiredRootFiles.role: index + cross-ref table (foundation ↔ business ↔ product ↔ architecture)
repo-local provisioning mirror of this pack

ux.purpose: Personas, jobs-to-be-done, workflows, journeys, information architecture, UX research
forbidden: GTM ICP prose — belongs in docs/business/customers/

surfaces.purpose: Surface inventory, navigation structures, permissions/roles — product-facing truth

requirements.purpose: Product requirements from the user/operator lens (not market sizing; not system architecture)

acceptance.purpose: Definition of done, UAT scenarios, regression critical paths — links to witness commands

prds.purpose: Pointer-only narrative index to pm/product/prds/ (no duplicate PRD state)

research.purpose: Product discovery notes only if not market/ICP (otherwise belongs in docs/business/research/)

forbiddenAtProductRoot: Loose narrative *.md except README.md and FOLDER-SPEC.md
Duplicate business ICP or pricing prose
Any roadmap docs — roadmaps live under docs/roadmap/ only

constitution-standards.allowed: docs/product/README.md pointer to fleet product repos and ecosystem-os

referenceDecompose.docs/architecture/specs/design/ux-resear: relocate → docs/product/ux/ (pointer stub left in architecture)
